name: bug-hunter
description: Browser-driven bug hunter agent for local SPA scanning

scripts.scan: node scripts/check-node.mjs && npm run build && node dist/index.js
scripts.scan:shipment: node scripts/check-node.mjs && npm run build && node dist/index.js -- --config configs/shipment.json
scripts.scan:cds-declaration: node scripts/check-node.mjs && npm run build && node dist/index.js -- --app cds-declaration --env local
scripts.hunt: node scripts/check-node.mjs && npm run build && node dist/index.js
scripts.setup:auth: node scripts/check-node.mjs && npm run build && node dist/setupAuth.js
scripts.pilot: node scripts/check-node.mjs && npm run build && node dist/pilot.js
